message: Satsang Diksha granth je vanchshe, mukhpath karshe teni moksha marge gati thashe.
Shriji Maharaj ane Guru Paramparana manma je hatu ej Satsang Dikshama lakhayu chhe.
Akshar-Purushottam Maharaj sarvane param shanti, anand ane sukh arpe.
A deha muktinu sadhan chhe keval bhognu sadhan nathi.
Antarma sukh vartya kare te Aksharnu sukh.
Jevi ruchi tevu fal.
Pramukh Swamina pagle pagle jivan jivi jaie. (Pramukh Swami Jayanti)
Panch indriyono ahar shuddha hashe to Bhagwanni akhand smruti raheshe.
Maharaj Swamini nishtha thai jay e gnan.
Ekadashinu vrat saday param adar thaki karvu.
Bhagwan ane Sadhu kahe tem karvu, to mannu raj tale.
Bhagwanna vachanma rahe to Bhagwan jevo anand pame.
Sant samagamthi unchu koi sukh nathi.
Satsang Diksha shastra e Maharajnu swarup chhe.
Swabhav mukva, to sarve kam thay.
Ka sukh Hari ke charan me ka Santan ke mahi.
Jiva to khub baliyo chhe, je dhare te thay. Mate mukhpathma mandi pado.
Kasotima par utare tena par ame raji thaie chhie.
Niyam-dharma ma dradh rahe te Akshardhamma jay.
Bhagwan je kare te saday sara matej hoy.
Gharna sabhyoe bhega thaine roj ghar sabha karvi.
Nijatmanam brahmarupam deha-traya-vilakshanam;Vibhavyopasanam karyam sadaiva Parabrahmanaha. (116)
Satsang Dikshano mukhpath = Akshardham.
Satsang Diksha shastrani hajaro tula kariye topan ochhi chhe.
Swaminarayan mantra divya, alaukik ane shubh mantra chhe.
Gnani thavu, premi nahi.
Satsang Dikshana Sanskrit shlokono mukhpath karnarne Akshar-Purushottam Darshanno vidvan janvo.
Bhajan karta-karta kriya karie to antarma tadhu rahe.
Satsang Diksha shastra sarva shastrono sar chhe.
Agna pramane dashansh-vishansh dharmado ape te sarvasva apya barabar chhe.
